title: BINKE (The Base)
overview: The documentary "Binke" aims to depict a slice of contemporary political history in Sanandaj. Binke focuses on pivotal moments, including the release of political prisoners during the 1979 revolution, the emergence of self-governance in Rojhelat, the establishment of Binkes and city council elections, the Islamic Republic of Iran's attack on Kurdistan, and Jina's 2022 uprising to reclaim the public sovereignty.

trailers.title: BINKE (The Base) Documentary/ بەڵگەفیلمی بنکە/ فیلم مستند بنکه
